title: SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: GOOD SHEPHERD HEALTH CARE SYSTEM SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained volunteers who educate, assist, and serve as advocates for people with Medicare. SHIBA volunteers help people with Medicare understand their rights and options for health insurance so that they can make informed decisions. SHIBA volunteers can also provide information on the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB) program, a Medicaid program that helps people with Medicare pay for their medical care. 610 NW 11th Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Individuals with Medicare and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 667-3509 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 667-3509 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties Services: Health Insurance Claims Assistance for Beneficiaries Medicaid Information/Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - CONNEXIONS INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HOSPITAL PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEAT INSPECTIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOOD SHEPHERD HEALTH CARE SYSTEM
